name: Google Calendar pull
description: Read-only Google Calendar ingestion through the connection broker (issue #304): events land in the staging band as core.event rows, incremental via the Calendar API's syncToken.
prompt: Every hour, pull my primary Google Calendar into the vault. Walk the whole calendar page by page on first runs, then follow the sync token incrementally. Read-only — never create or modify events upstream. Stage everything for my review unless I set the connection to auto-publish.

vault.why: Stages Google Calendar events into the vault's review band and tracks the incremental syncToken cursor on the pull.gcal connection.
